description: Curated Q-A-source triples over the EvalCorp policy corpus (sample_docs/evalcorp). Source labels are document-level. Hand-written together with the corpus; spot-checked pairwise.

items.question: How many days of paid annual leave do full-time employees accrue per year?
items.reference_answer: 24 days per calendar year, accruing at 2 days per month.

items.question: How many unused vacation days can I carry over to next year, and when do they expire?
items.reference_answer: Up to 6 days may be carried over; they expire on April 30.

items.question: What notice is required for taking more than four consecutive days of annual leave?
items.reference_answer: 15 business days of advance notice via the HR portal.

items.question: When do I need a doctor's note for sick leave?
items.reference_answer: For absences of 3 or more consecutive days, submitted within 48 hours of returning.

items.question: How long is fully paid parental leave for primary caregivers?
items.reference_answer: 16 weeks fully paid (secondary caregivers get 4 weeks).

items.question: Can parental leave be split into multiple periods?
items.reference_answer: Yes, into at most 2 blocks within the first 12 months after birth or adoption.

items.question: How many days off do I get if I get married?
items.reference_answer: 3 days of paid marriage leave.

items.question: What are the conditions for requesting unpaid leave?
items.reference_answer: After 2 years of tenure, up to 3 months once every 5 years, with VP approval and 60 days notice.

items.question: How many days per week can I work from home?
items.reference_answer: Up to 2 days per week; Tuesdays and Thursdays are mandatory office days.

items.question: Which weekdays does everyone have to be in the office?
items.reference_answer: Tuesdays and Thursdays.

items.question: What are the core hours for remote employees?
items.reference_answer: 09:30-15:30 Istanbul time (UTC+3).

items.question: How much is the one-time home office stipend and the monthly internet allowance?
items.reference_answer: 9000 TRY one-time stipend and 400 TRY monthly internet allowance.

items.question: How many days per year am I allowed to work from abroad?
items.reference_answer: At most 30 calendar days per year, from approved countries, with security sign-off 10 business days in advance.

items.question: Is using coffee-shop Wi-Fi allowed when working remotely?
items.reference_answer: Public Wi-Fi may be used only through the corporate VPN.

items.question: Who approves a fully remote arrangement and how often is it reviewed?
items.reference_answer: Director approval, re-evaluated every quarter.

items.question: How far in advance must international business trips be booked?
items.reference_answer: At least 14 days in advance through the corporate travel portal (domestic: 7 days).

items.question: What is the domestic per-diem rate?
items.reference_answer: 1800 TRY per day, covering meals and incidentals, no receipts required.

items.question: What is the per-diem for business travel in Europe?
items.reference_answer: 90 EUR per day (other international regions: 110 USD per day).

items.question: When can I fly premium economy?
items.reference_answer: On flights over 6 hours; economy is standard under 6 hours.

items.question: What is the mileage reimbursement rate for using my own car?
items.reference_answer: 14 TRY per kilometer on approved trips.

items.question: What is the nightly hotel cap for domestic travel?
items.reference_answer: 7500 TRY per night (international: 180 EUR per night).

items.question: What happens if I lose a receipt for a large expense?
items.reference_answer: Items above 3000 TRY without a receipt are not reimbursed.

items.question: How soon after a trip must I submit my expense report?
items.reference_answer: Within 21 days of trip completion, with itemized receipts.

items.question: What are the password length and rotation requirements?
items.reference_answer: At least 16 characters, stored in the approved password manager, rotated every 12 months or after suspected compromise.

items.question: How quickly must a suspected security incident be reported and to whom?
items.reference_answer: Within 30 minutes to the SOC via #sec-incident or the 24/7 hotline.

items.question: What is the deadline for reporting a lost laptop?
items.reference_answer: Within 4 hours.

items.question: Can I check work email on my personal phone?
items.reference_answer: Only after installing an approved MDM work profile.

items.question: Can production data be used in development environments?
items.reference_answer: No, never; use the approved anonymized datasets instead.

items.question: How long does privileged admin access last once granted?
items.reference_answer: It expires after 12 hours, requires a ticket, and is fully logged.

items.question: What happens to access that hasn't been used for three months?
items.reference_answer: Access unused for 90 days is revoked automatically.

items.question: How long is the probation period for new hires?
items.reference_answer: 4 months, with a week-8 mid-point check-in; extendable once by up to 2 months.

items.question: In which months do performance reviews happen, and when are promotions decided?
items.reference_answer: Reviews in May and November; promotions only in the November cycle.

items.question: Does health insurance cover my family?
items.reference_answer: Yes, spouses and children are covered at no extra cost from day one.

items.question: How much is loaded on the meal card per working day?
items.reference_answer: 350 TRY per working day.

items.question: What is the annual learning budget and does it roll over?
items.reference_answer: 30000 TRY per year, manager-approved; unused budget does not roll over.

items.question: How much is the referral bonus and when is it paid?
items.reference_answer: 40000 TRY gross, paid after the referred employee completes probation; double for listed hard-to-fill roles.
